name: Reviews & Social Proof
description: How customer reviews and social proof should be displayed to build trust and aid purchase decisions

heuristics.principle: Reviews should be visible on the product page without requiring navigation away
checkpoints: Customer reviews are accessible on the PDP
Users do not need to navigate to separate pages for reviews
Reviews section is easy to find and access
Review content loads on the same page (inline or expandable)

heuristics.principle: Summary indicators such as average rating and review count should be visible near the product title or price
checkpoints: Star rating or equivalent is prominently displayed
Rating summary is visible above the fold
Rating links to full reviews section

heuristics.principle: Users should be able to scan and filter reviews by relevance or rating
checkpoints: Reviews can be sorted (most recent, most helpful, rating)
Filter by star rating is available
Review highlights or summary is provided
Users can search reviews if volume is high

heuristics.principle: Review content should include both positive and critical feedback to build trust
checkpoints: Mix of positive and negative reviews is displayed
Critical reviews are not hidden or suppressed
Verified purchase badges or similar trust signals exist
